subject: LIGO/Virgo S191216ap: no INTEGRAL observation
body:
D. Gotz (AIM/DAp CEA Saclay, France), A. Lutovinov (IKI, Russia)
V. Savchenko, C. Ferrigno (ISDC/UniGE, Switzerland)
S. Mereghetti (INAF IASF-Milano, Italy)
A. Coleiro (APC, France)
on behalf of the INTEGRAL multi-messenger collaboration report:
https://www.astro.unige.ch/cdci/integral-multimessenger-collaboration

At the time of LIGO/Virgo S191216ap event (GCN 26454) INTEGRAL was at its perigee,
and its instruments were turned off. No INTEGRAL coverage is thus available for
LIGO/Virgo S191216ap.
